---
title: "Projects"
---

# My Projects

Here are my research projects and work:

## Final Report

My final project for CELL 6351 - Intro to Reproducible Data Analysis Using R.

[**View Final Report** →](projects/final-report.qmd)

---

## Adding More Projects

As you continue your research journey, you can add more pages here! For example:

- Conference posters
- Publications
- Data visualizations
- Analysis write-ups
- Project proposals

To add a new project:

1. Create a new `.qmd` file in the `projects/` folder
2. Add a link to it on this page
3. Push to GitHub and your site updates automatically!
